entry.title: New: BILL033(26) (Honolulu) — HHP
entry.content:
RELATING TO FUNDS.

Establishes a special fund to be called the Parks Maintenance and Recreation Services Revolving Fund for the deposit of all revenues and proceeds generated by the DPR relating to the use of lands dedicated for park use or for park maintenance and recreation services, or otherwise earmarked for the restoration, operation, or maintenance of beaches and parks under the jurisdiction of the DPR, to be expended for DPR operations and parks maintenance and recreational facilities under the jurisdiction of the DPR. Establishes a special fund to be called the Botanical Gardens and Urban Forestry Revolving Fund for the deposit of all revenues and proceeds relating to the use of lands dedicated for botanical gardens, community gardens, and urban forestry programs and operations generated by the DPR, or otherwise earmarked for the restoration, operation, or maintenance of parks, beaches, gardens, and street trees under the jurisdiction of the DPR, to be expended for the operations of the DPR’s Division of Urban Forestry

Latest action: See: Proposed draft version OCS2026-0188/3/30/2026 12:02 PM Amended to CD1 and postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site
